Package view

package view
Provides the graphical user interface (GUI) components and visual rendering systems. * This package represents the View layer of the application. Its primary responsibility is to translate logical game data into interactive JavaFX components. * Key architectural components within this package include: - Entity Visualization: Classes that synchronize with their respective models. - HUD and UI Layouts: Specialized containers for player interaction. - Dynamic Rendering: Systems for drawing game paths and managing visual shapes. - Factory Patterns: Centralized creation logic for complex view objects.
  • Class
    Description
    CardBar
    The CardBar class represents the interactive toolbar for selecting towers or spells within the game's interface.
    CardView
    Represents the visual representation of a single collectible item, such as a Tower or a Spell.
    EnemyView
    Provides the graphical representation and real-time status tracking for enemy entities.
    EnemyViewFactory
    The EnemyViewFactory class provides a centralized mechanism for creating EnemyView instances based on the specific type of enemy.
    PathView
    Provides the visual rendering of the enemy navigational route on the game map.
    TowerView
    The TowerView class provides the graphical representation for a specific tower instance.
    VisualShape
    Defines the set of primitive geometric shapes used for visual identification of game entities.
